prompt:
## Intent

I  need a visual test run indicator added to the ui so i know what tests are run and the status of them so we can monitor live code state. that means the test that the ai generates needs to added and updated realtime with releevant state and status codes.

## Desired Outcome

Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests.

## Repo Context

- Intent Driven Development POC (intent-poc-app)
- Start in Intent Studio: src/demo-app/render/render-intent-studio-page.ts.
- intent-poc-app verification note: Stateful UI bugs should declare and verify the requested UI state before screenshot evidence is trusted.
- intent-poc-app verification note: Prefer reusable state activation contracts over prompt-specific routing or one-off checkpoint logic.
- intent-poc-app repo note: Surface library screenshot regeneration routes through this source with an explicit library publish opt-in.

## Source Scope

- intent-poc-app
- Selected source: intent-poc-app.
- Likely owning surface: Intent Studio (high confidence).
- Fallback surfaces to inspect next: Capture And Evidence and Surface Library.

## Adaptive Boundaries

- Integrate with existing Intent Studio rendering pipeline
- Maintain real-time status updates without blocking UI thread
- Keep this draft inside intent-poc-app until the owning surface is confirmed.
- Start with Intent Studio before widening into adjacent surfaces.
- Resolve whether the change belongs to Capture And Evidence and Surface Library before touching multiple UI surfaces.

## Minimum Success

- Visual indicator appears in Studio UI
- Indicator reflects live test status codes
- State updates are reflected in real-time
- Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests.
- The draft keeps the change centered on Intent Studio instead of the whole repo.
- The final plan names one existing UI verification path instead of inventing a new workflow.

## Baseline

- Current Intent Studio rendering logic in src/demo-app/render/render-intent-studio-page.ts
- Capture the current baseline in Intent Studio before changing behavior.

## Verification Obligations

- Verify UI state before screenshot evidence
- Use Playwright for interaction testing
- Ensure theme-mode consistency in status indicators
- Name the existing Playwright or screenshot check that will prove the behavior change.

## Raw Intent

I  need a visual test run indicator added to the ui so i know what tests are run and the status of them so we can monitor live code state. that means the test that the ai generates needs to added and updated realtime with releevant state and status codes.

normalizedIntent.rawPrompt:
I  need a visual test run indicator added to the ui so i know what tests are run and the status of them so we can monitor live code state. that means the test that the ai generates needs to added and updated realtime with releevant state and status codes.

Desired outcome: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests.

codeSurface.label: Intent Studio
codeSurface.rationale: The prompt targets Intent Studio run results, run status, or capture links inside intent-poc-app.

alternatives.label: Capture And Evidence
alternatives.reason: The issue may still involve capture outputs, but the broken behavior is in the Studio results UI.

alternatives.label: Surface Library
alternatives.reason: The request still references screenshots and could be mistaken for a library evidence task.

businessIntent.statement: Implement a real-time visual test run indicator in Intent Studio that displays active test status and state codes for AI-generated tests to enable live monitoring of code execution state.
businessIntent.desiredOutcome: A persistent UI component in Intent Studio that dynamically updates to show the current status (e.g., Pending, Running, Passed, Failed) and state codes of AI-generated test executions.

acceptanceCriteria.description: A new UI component is visible in the Intent Studio interface during test execution.
The indicator updates in real-time as test states change.
The indicator displays both human-readable status and machine-readable state codes.
Visual evidence of the indicator in 'Running' and 'Completed' states is captured via Playwright.

scenarios.title: Verify test run indicator visibility
scenarios.goal: Ensure the indicator appears when a test execution begins.
given: The user is in the Intent Studio interface
when: An AI-generated test execution is triggered
then: The test run indicator component becomes visible
The indicator displays a 'Running' status and the initial state code

scenarios.title: Verify real-time status updates
scenarios.goal: Ensure the indicator reflects state changes accurately.
given: A test execution is in progress
The test run indicator is visible
when: The test execution transitions to a 'Passed' or 'Failed' state
then: The indicator updates the status text immediately
The indicator displays the corresponding final state code

workItems.title: Implement and verify real-time test run indicator in Intent Studio
workItems.description: Add a persistent UI component to Intent Studio that displays the current status and state codes of AI-generated test executions, and verify its behavior in real-time.
workItems.userVisibleOutcome: A persistent UI component in Intent Studio that dynamically updates to show the current status and state codes of AI-generated test executions.
workItems.verification: Playwright specs will verify the presence of the indicator, its visibility during execution, and the accuracy of status and state code updates.

checkpoints.label: Verify indicator visibility and running state
checkpoints.assertion: Indicator is visible and shows running state.

repoContext: Intent Studio serves as the primary UI for monitoring live code state and AI-generated test runs.
adaptiveBoundaries: Indicator must update in real-time without blocking the main Studio execution thread.
minimumSuccess: Visual indicator displays test status and state codes for active AI-generated tests within the Studio interface.
baseline: Current Intent Studio UI lacks live test monitoring and status feedback.
verificationObligations: Verify indicator updates using Playwright to simulate test state changes; ensure theme-mode consistency for the new UI component.

destinations.label: Controller artifacts
destinations.reason: Local evidence bundles are always written by the controller.
details: Stores plan, manifests, logs, captures, and summaries on disk.

destinations.label: Source workspace publication
destinations.reason: Workspace publishing is disabled until artifacts.storageMode is set to 'both'.
details: Useful when evidence should live beside the source repository.

tools.label: BDD planning
tools.reason: The system converts the raw prompt into reviewable acceptance criteria and scenarios during the full reviewed plan pass.
details: Deterministic by default, with optional Gemini refinement when configured.

tools.label: Playwright TDD generation
tools.reason: Applicable sources now produce Playwright-first executable test plans and checkpoint screenshots.
details: Generated specs are intended for checked-in repo storage with overwrite semantics.

tools.label: Visual verification
tools.reason: Applicable sources currently expose visual checkpoints and capture definitions.
details: Playwright screenshots remain one execution tool rather than the top-level product model.

tools.label: Environment deployment
tools.reason: A generic local or Kubernetes deployment stage is planned but not yet wired into the runner.
details: This will become the shared path for local, minikube, and k3s-backed execution.

tools.label: Implementation loop
tools.reason: The runner can execute bounded implementation attempts against the prepared source workspace.
details: QA failures can feed directly back into the next bounded implementation attempt.

tools.label: QA verification
tools.reason: The runner can now execute a bounded QA bundle before evidence capture completes the lane.
details: The default QA bundle runs typecheck, the deterministic code test suite, and generated Playwright specs when a source enables them.

tools.label: Evidence reporting
tools.reason: Every run produces summaries and machine-readable manifests.
details: Reports become distribution inputs for downstream review and publishing surfaces.
